paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer, and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours. News sources include TradingView, Stocktwits, FinanzNachrichten.de, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, a SCHEDULE 13G filing, and 8-K filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes. There has been 1 new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
